description: PROP-001 and PROP-002 are marked 'required: true' in the verification architecture and specified as Tier 1 property-based tests using fast-check. The test file step2-serialize-note.test.ts imports fc from '@fast-check/vitest' (line 12) but never uses it. All PROP-001 and PROP-002 tests are example-based (single concrete inputs), not property-based (random generated inputs). PROP-001 tests referential transparency with a single fixed input ('same input always produces identical output') rather than generating arbitrary ValidatedSaveRequest inputs. PROP-002 tests format compliance with a single fixed body string rather than generating arbitrary frontmatter and body combinations. This fails the verification architecture's requirement that these proofs use 'fast-check (property: ...) '.
